failure_mode: A recurring quickstart failure should become a regression candidate.
proposed_check: Reproduce finding `finding-learning-quickstart-gap` for bundle `rb-demo-pr-review-001` and assert that `quickstart_dx_failure` does not recur without an explicit rejected-proposal rationale.
acceptance: The regression check fails on the source finding `finding-learning-quickstart-gap` before the fix.
The check passes after the smallest scoped fix or remains explicitly rejected with rationale.
Evidence refs remain tied to the original review bundle/report.
rationale: Future docs could regress by omitting auth setup again.
